log.content: Breadth-First Search explores graph level by level using queue. Finds shortest path in unweighted graphs. O(V+E) time. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Algorithms **🔗 Related Concepts:** - binary search - linear search - bubble sort

Inspired by biological neurons. Consists of layers: input, hidden, output. Nodes connected by weighted edges. Learns through backpropagation. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Deep Learning **🔗 Related Concepts:** - neural network - neuron - activation function

Learns word embeddings from large corpus. Two architectures: CBOW (predict word from context), Skip-gram (predict context from word). Captures semantic relationships. **📊 Current Level:** Beginner | **Topic:** Machine Learning **🔗 Related Concepts:** - machine learning - supervised learning - unsupervised learning
